case_title: LORENA HERNANDEZ VS. VICTORIA CALVO PEREZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,700.00 FILED BY HERNANDEZ, LORENA AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, VICTORIA CALVO PEREZ, MANUEL CALVO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-12-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (4 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, LORENA
DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED JUN-21-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, VICTORIA CALVO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-19-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-28-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANTS TO PAY PLAINTIFF $2700 BY OCTOBER 19, 2016. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MANUEL CALVO PEREZ WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED JUN-21-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, MANUEL CALVO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-12-2016 - CONTINUED TO RECONCILE CALENDARING DISCREPANCY TO JUL-19-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF LORENA HERNANDEZ. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS VICTORIA CALVO PEREZ OR MANUEL CALVO PEREZ. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE AS TO BOTH DEFENDANTS. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
